name: Devil's Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Cooking Oil or as needed
10 oz (1 cup) Mushrooms, stems and pieces removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into small pieces.
2. Trim all fat and membranes from the pieces.
3. Pound each piece until 1/4-inch thick or less.
4. Mix mustard, salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce in a shallow dish.
5. Dredge meat on both sides in the mixture.
6. Heat a large frying pan with oil over medium heat.
7. Fry pieces in batches for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes on each side until golden brown. Keep warm.
8. Drain mushrooms and set aside.
9. Add mushroom liquid, Worcestershire sauce, and remaining wine to the pan.
10. Simmer and scrape off pan drippings.
11. If desired, thicken the liquid with flour or cornstarch.
12. Serve over meat.
NOTE:
Meat may be pounded ahead of time if desired. Refrigerate in single layers or dry slightly before dredging as this will make it brown more quickly.
